title: Create Ultimate
description: All addons you need for Create
body:
# Create, but with a lot of addons

**Create Ultimate** is a mod pack that includes a wide variety of addons for the Create mod. It has both well-known and lesser-known addons, so you'll find everything you need in this pack.

**_40+ addons for Create and more soon!_**

**_And other mods that enhance the experience of Create!_**

<details>
<summary>Modlist</summary>

### Mods: 
- [**Create**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create) - Base. 
- [Farmer's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) - For your farms and food production facilities. 
- [CC: Tweaked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cc-tweaked) - For automation using programmable computers. 
- [Little Logistics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/little-logistics) - For the transportation of resources by water and rail.
### Addons: 
- [**Create: Steam 'n' Rails**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-steam-n-rails)
- [**Create Crafts & Additions**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/createaddition)
- [**Create Goggles**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-goggles)
- [**Create Jetpack**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-jetpack)
- [**Create Enchantment Industry**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-enchantment-industry)

- [Just Enough Items](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei)

### Optifine is not compatible with some addons!

You can report issues and suggest addons to the modpack. Please email to **comparator.official@mail.ru**.
